description: The lookup fails closed without silent accepts or misrouted denials: no location in context is an error, and an unknown combination resolves to needs-verification — non-permissive for booking, routed to verification instead of turn-away (REQ-ADM-047 exception 1).

cases.name: lookup without a location in context is an error
an unknown combination resolves to needs-verification, never a silent accept or a plain deny
